full_text:
Song Ding
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Song Ding. Stationed near Lü Meng who considered him to have given valuable service. Song Ding was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Song Ding lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
